articles.author: Ray Ratto
articles.title: The Canadiens Butted Their Way Into An Upset - Defector
articles.description: It has been noted that the Montreal Canadiens won Game 7 of their series with the Tampa Bay Lightning on Sunday night with a Stanley Cup Playoff record-low nine shots on goal. This is clearly not true. It was eight. It can only be nine if we are defining “on”…
